metadata.name: stargaze_anchor
metadata.description: Solana-side mirror of StargazeRegistry for Solana-native providers, plus x402 USDC receipt verification.

docs: Conversion of routing-fee USDC into $GAZE for the burn ladder is handled
in a separate (admin-only) instruction `convert_routing_fees_to_gaze`
which is **NOT** in scope here. The planned flow is:
1. Drain `routing_fee_vault_ata` (USDC).
2. Swap USDC -> $GAZE via Jupiter (or comparable router).
3. CPI into `process_routing_fee_burn` with the resulting $GAZE.
Until that instruction lands, settled routing fees accumulate as USDC
in the vault.
StargazeAnchor — Solana-side mirror of the Tempo `StargazeRegistry`.
Responsibilities:
1. Register Solana-native providers (no $GAZE stake here; reputational
score is mirrored from Tempo via the CCIP bridge).
2. Persist x402 USDC receipts so the indexer can project them into
Postgres without re-fetching tx history.
3. Cast reputation votes that mirror to Tempo (CPI to the CCIP router
stubbed for now — wired in M4).

instructions.name: claim_unstake
docs: Claim queued unstake amount once the cooldown has elapsed. Transfers
`cooldown_amount` from the pool back to the staker and clears the
cooldown state.

accounts.name: stake_pool_authority
docs: via the seeds constraint.

instructions.name: close_session
docs: Close the session: pay any remaining deposit back to the agent.
Callable by the router at any time; callable by the agent only after
`expires_at`. The Session account itself is not closed — kept on-chain
for the indexer.

accounts.name: agent_ata
docs: record.

instructions.name: configure_vault
docs: Configure (or re-configure) the privacy-vault entry for `provider_id`.
The caller must be `provider.owner`. On re-configure, the existing
`auditor_key` and `buyer_key_rotation_cid` are preserved; only `tier`,
`on_chain_verifier`, `arweave_cid`, and `active` (forced back to true)
are overwritten. Mirrors `PrivacyVaultRegistry.configure` on EVM.

instructions.name: deactivate_vault
docs: Admin-only deactivation. Mirrors EVM's `DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE`-gated
`deactivate`: the caller must be `Config.authority`, NOT the provider
owner. Sets `active = false`; re-configuring later flips it back.

instructions.name: dispatch_reputation_to_tempo
docs: Dispatch a reputation snapshot for `provider_id` to the Tempo receiver
via Chainlink CCIP. The on-chain `Provider.reputation_score` is the
authoritative value being mirrored.
Payload schema (matches `StargazeCcipReceiver.ccipReceive`):
`abi.encode(bytes32 providerId, uint16 score)` — 64 bytes total.
CPI into the Chainlink router is wired in M4; for now the message is
emitted as a `CcipDispatched` event so the indexer can observe it.
The router program id is supplied via the `CHAINLINK_CCIP_PROGRAM_ID`
env var at deploy time.

accounts.name: ccip_router_program
docs: in by the client so a future CPI can target the configured router.

instructions.name: dispatch_stake_to_tempo
docs: Dispatch a per-staker stake snapshot for `(provider_id, owner)` to the
Tempo `StargazeStakeMirror` receiver via Chainlink CCIP. The on-chain
`StakeAccount.amount` is the authoritative value being mirrored.
Payload schema (matches `StargazeStakeMirror.ccipReceive`):
`abi.encode(bytes32 providerId, address owner, uint256 amount)` —
96 bytes total.
Note: `owner` is the Solana staker pubkey truncated to the bottom 20
bytes to fit Solidity's 32-byte address slot; the Tempo mirror treats
it as a per-Solana-staker key, NOT an EVM address. The Tempo side
never needs to send a transaction from this address.
CPI into the Chainlink router is wired in M4; for now the message is
emitted as a `StakeDispatched` event so the indexer can observe it.

accounts.name: ccip_router_program
docs: in by the client so a future CPI can target the configured router.

instructions.name: init_escrow
docs: One-shot initialiser for the escrow side: records the USDC mint and the
router pubkey that is permitted to call `settle`. The caller must be
the existing `Config.authority` admin.

instructions.name: init_staking
docs: Initialise the `StakingConfig` singleton. Admin only (must match
the existing `Config.authority`). If `stake_mint == Pubkey::default()`
the pool token account is not created — call `set_stake_mint` later
once the pump.fun launch has produced the real mint.

instructions.name: open_session
docs: Open a new escrow session. The agent deposits `deposit` USDC into the
per-session vault. `spending_limit` caps cumulative settled spend
(must be <= `deposit`). `expires_at` is a unix timestamp after which
settles are rejected and the agent can self-close.

instructions.name: process_routing_fee_burn
docs: Process a routing-fee tranche through the burn ladder. Splits `amount`
50/50: half is permanently burned via `token::burn` (reducing SPL
supply), half is transferred to the staker-reward pool ATA controlled
by the `staker_reward_pool_authority` PDA. On odd amounts the extra
base unit is routed to stakers (`to_stakers = amount - amount/2`).
The reward pool only accumulates here — distribution is deferred.
Defer: staker reward distribution mechanism (pull-based Merkle vs
push-based proportional) is unresolved.
M4: the `authority` admin gate is swapped for the CCIP fan-out so the
Tempo routing fee can be processed without a privileged signer.

accounts.name: staker_reward_pool_authority
docs: via the seeds constraint; the ATA constraint below pins ownership.

instructions.name: reputation_vote_burn
docs: Burn one $GAZE token from the voter's ATA as the on-chain cost of
casting a reputation vote against `provider_id`. The vote itself is
emitted upstream via `cast_reputation_vote` / Tempo; this instruction
only enforces the token-burn cost. Insufficient balance bubbles up as
a token-program error.

instructions.name: request_unstake
docs: Queue `amount` for unstake. The amount remains in the pool until
the cooldown expires and `claim_unstake` is called. Multiple
consecutive requests accumulate into `cooldown_amount` and reset the
cooldown clock to the latest call.

instructions.name: set_stake_mint
docs: One-shot setter for the stake mint, used when staking is initialised
before the pump.fun launch has produced the SPL mint. Also creates the
pool token account on first call. Subsequent calls are rejected unless
the mint is still `Pubkey::default()` on entry.

accounts.name: stake_pool_authority
docs: via the seeds constraint.

instructions.name: set_vault_auditor_key
docs: Set the optional auditor key on an active vault. Caller must be
`provider.owner`. Emits the previous + new value so observers can
reconstruct rotation history.

instructions.name: set_vault_buyer_key_rotation_cid
docs: Update the Arweave CID of the per-buyer key rotation policy. Caller
must be `provider.owner`; the vault must be active.

instructions.name: settle
docs: Apply one voucher to the session: transfer (cumulative_amount - prev)
USDC from the session vault, split 98% to the provider ATA and 2% to
the singleton routing-fee vault. The voucher must be paired with an
Ed25519 precompile instruction directly preceding this one in the same
transaction; the program enforces `pubkey == session.agent_wallet`
and the message bytes match the args.

accounts.name: router
docs: The router pays rent for the `consumed_voucher` PDA. Treated as
protocol overhead.

accounts.name: voucher_cursor
docs: system_program CPI on first use.

accounts.name: consumed_voucher
docs: Replay-protection marker, init-created per (session_id, message_hash)
— second use of the same voucher hits `AccountAlreadyInUse` here.
`message_hash` is an instruction arg that the handler asserts equals
`sha256(build_voucher_message_bytes(...))`, so replay protection still
keys off the canonical voucher bytes.

instructions.name: slash
docs: Admin-only slash. Transfers up to `amount` base units from the pool
to the canonical Solana incinerator burn address. The amount is
capped at the target's currently-available (non-cooldown) stake to
keep accounting consistent.

instructions.name: stake
docs: Stake `amount` base units of $GAZE against `provider_id`. The caller
is the staker; tokens move from `staker_ata` into the pool. The
per-staker `StakeAccount` is created on first stake.

accounts.name: stake_pool_authority
docs: via the seeds constraint.

errors.name: ScoreOutOfRange
errors.msg: Reputation score must be between 0 and 1000.

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.msg: Caller is not authorised for this instruction.

errors.name: StakeAmountZero
errors.msg: Stake amount must be greater than zero.

errors.name: StakeMintUnset
errors.msg: Stake mint has not been configured yet.

errors.name: StakeMintAlreadySet
errors.msg: Stake mint is already configured; one-shot setter rejected.

errors.name: InsufficientStake
errors.msg: Insufficient stake to satisfy the requested amount.

errors.name: CooldownActive
errors.msg: Cooldown period has not elapsed yet.

errors.name: NoCooldownInProgress
errors.msg: No cooldown is currently in progress for this stake account.

errors.name: UnauthorizedRouter
errors.msg: Caller is not the configured router.

errors.name: WrongSigner
errors.msg: Voucher signer does not match the session's agent wallet.

errors.name: WrongMessage
errors.msg: Voucher message bytes in the precompile do not match the instruction args.

errors.name: MissingPrecompile
errors.msg: Missing or malformed Ed25519 precompile instruction directly before settle.

errors.name: NonMonotonic
errors.msg: Voucher cumulative amount is not strictly greater than the previous value.

errors.name: SpendingLimitExceeded
errors.msg: Cumulative spend would exceed the session's spending limit.

errors.name: AlreadySettled
errors.msg: Session has already been settled / closed.

errors.name: SessionExpired
errors.msg: Session expiry has passed.

errors.name: SessionNotExpired
errors.msg: Session expiry has not yet passed; caller must be the router.

errors.name: NumericalOverflow
errors.msg: Numerical overflow.

errors.name: SessionAccountMismatch
errors.msg: Session account or vault authority mismatch.

errors.name: NotProviderOwner
errors.msg: Caller is not the registered provider owner.

errors.name: VaultInactive
errors.msg: Vault PDA does not exist or has been deactivated.

fields.name: total_routing_fee_burned
docs: Cumulative base units burned through `process_routing_fee_burn`. The
reward-pool counterpart lives in `total_routing_fee_to_stakers`.

fields.name: total_routing_fee_to_stakers
docs: Cumulative base units routed to the staker reward pool ATA. Pure
accumulator — distribution mechanism is deferred.

fields.name: on_chain_verifier
docs: Solana program id of the per-provider Groth16 verifier. `Pubkey::default()`
is treated as "unset".

fields.name: auditor_key
docs: Optional confidential-payments auditor key. `Pubkey::default()` = unset.

types.name: VaultTier
docs: Privacy-tier enum for `VaultConfig`. Mirrors the four EVM tier hashes
(`keccak256("open" | "zk-aggregate" | "confidential" | "buyer-key")`) but
as a type-safe `repr(u8)` enum — Borsh refuses to deserialize an unknown
variant, so the on-chain handler does not need an `UnknownTier` revert.

constants.name: COOLDOWN_DEFAULT_SECS
docs: Default unstake cooldown window (7 days).

constants.name: MIN_STAKE_DEFAULT
docs: Minimum stake required for a Solana-native provider to be considered active
(50 GAZE at 6 decimals).

constants.name: ROUTING_FEE_BPS
docs: Routing-fee basis points. 2% of every voucher amount is diverted from the
provider payout into the singleton routing-fee USDC vault.

constants.name: VERIFIED_STAKE_DEFAULT
docs: Stake threshold for a provider to be considered "verified"
(500 GAZE at 6 decimals).

constants.name: VOTE_BURN_AMOUNT
docs: Fixed reputation-vote burn amount: 1 GAZE at 6 decimals. One vote = one
token, irrevocably burned from the voter's ATA. Surfaced through the IDL so
the indexer and the client SDK can both reference the same constant.

constants.name: VOUCHER_DOMAIN_TAG
docs: Domain separator for the off-chain voucher signing scheme. Twenty-one
ASCII bytes; surfaced through the IDL so the off-chain SDK can copy the
same literal byte-for-byte. The voucher message starts with this prefix
followed by `session_id || agent_wallet || provider_id ||
cumulative_amount_le || nonce_le` for a total of 133 bytes.

constants.name: VOUCHER_MESSAGE_LEN
docs: Total length of the voucher message bytes that the off-chain agent signs
and the on-chain program verifies (see `VOUCHER_DOMAIN_TAG`).
